aiTeamPresets.title: AI Team Presets
aiTeamPresets.description: Manage member presets and team presets in one place.

input.archivedPlaceholder: This session is archived and read-only.
input.inputPlaceholder: Use @ to send message to members...
input.sendHint: Press Enter to send, Shift+Enter for new line.
input.workbenchHint: Paste screenshots, drag files, or type @ to route work.

protocolNotice.invalidSendIntent: Agent "{{agent}}" returned an invalid send intent.

installed.title: Installed
installed.toggleUnsupported: {{runnerType}} currently exposes installed skills as a native directory only. This app can read them, but it cannot safely write an enable/disable flag back for this runner yet.
